Hi! I am VISHNU. I graduated from RGUKT RKV with a bachelor's degree in Eletronics and Communication Engineering, in May 2015. Currently, I am working as a Project Research Assistant in Systems and Control Engineering Department of IITB. My areas of interest are robotics, machine learning, AI, and Computer Vision
